title: genista triflorus var. villosus
intro: Genista triflorus var. villosus is a plant species, also known as a type of broom or Spanish broom, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The medicinal properties of Genista triflorus var. villosus include its ability to act as a laxative and its use in treating kidney stones and other urinary issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, while also acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Genista triflorus var. villosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
